channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Meta contractor dismissed threats to moderators from Ethiopia rebels
item.description: A contractor hired by Facebook’s parent company Meta dismissed threats to content moderators by Ethiopian rebels angered by their work, according to new evidence filed in a case challenging the dismissal of dozens of moderators in Kenya.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Trump taps FTC Commissioner Andrew Ferguson to chair agency
item.description: President-elect Trump has tapped Andrew Ferguson, a commissioner at the Federal Trade Commission (FTC), as the next head of the independent agency.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Why Meta shareholders are seeking sanctions for former COO Sheryl Sandberg
item.description: Attorneys for Meta shareholders asked a Delaware judge Monday to sanction the company’s former Chief Operating Officer Sheryl Sandberg and fellow Facebook board member and current White House chief of staff Jeff Zients for deleting emails related to the Cambridge Analytica privacy scandal, despite b
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Gentrace makes it easier for businesses to test AI-powered software
item.description: As businesses continue to integrate generative AI into their products, many find it challenging to actually test whether the AI is behaving correctly and giving useful answers.
item.dc:creator: Steven Melendez, Fast Company

item.title: Atmospheric river and potential bomb cyclone will bring messy, dangerous weather to East Coast
item.description: The East Coast is due for a whiplash-inducing rainy, windy and potentially dangerous stretch of weather.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Whittle, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: In 2025, AI will elevate the CIO role. Here’s why
item.description: AI has already affected the CIO role, and next year will be no different. In 2025, the technology will test CIOs in new ways while also elevating their role as they process the speed at which AI is being adopted—both internally and externally.
item.dc:creator: Felix Van de Maele, Fast Company

item.title: AI for chefs: 8 ways LLMs can make restaurant life a bit easier
item.description: Cooking is alchemy, combining two things to create something unexpected. In a way, AI is the same, with unexpected combinations creating new and exciting things. Here’s how alchemists of food and AI can work together, with our eight top tips for chefs interested in AI.
item.dc:creator: Richard Baguley, Fast Company

item.title: California to Introduce Mental Health Warning Labels for Social Media
item.description: California lawmakers propose requiring mental health warning labels on social media sites, citing concerns over children's online safety and well-being.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: AWS customers hit by major cyberattack which then stored stolen credentials in plain sight
item.description: Many sites were misconfigured, allowing hackers to exfiltrate sensitive data and sell it on the dark web.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Johnson pours cold water on KOSA push
item.description: House Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) cautioned Republicans against rushing to pass a bill to protect kids and teens online on Tuesday as the GOP prepares to take control of the White House and Congress.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: The Future of Mac Development: Insights from the Setapp Survey
item.description: Mac developers face key decisions as they approach 2025, with the eighth Mac developer survey from Setapp shedding light on their priorities and concerns.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Fortnite players 'tricked' into unwanted purchases are starting to get refunds. Here's how to apply
item.description: U.S. consumers who were tricked into purchases they didn’t want from Fortnite maker Epic Games are now starting to receive refund checks, the Federal Trade Commission said this week.
item.dc:creator: Wyatte Grantham-Philips, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Boosting Cyprus' defense is key so close to the war-wracked Mideast, defense minister says
item.description: NICOSIA, Cyprus (AP) — Bolstering Cyprus ' defense capacity is critical for the east Mediterranean island nation so close to the war-wrecked Middle East, the country's defense minister said Tuesday. The priority for Cyprus is to procure better defense systems, said Defense Minister Vasilis Palmas.
item.dc:creator: MENELAOS HADJICOSTIS, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: 5 Lessons every CFO can learn from a billionaire singer-songwriter
item.description: When you have a young daughter like I do, it’s almost impossible to avoid getting swept up into the Taylor Swift fan frenzy.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: 2025 is the year of quantum science; what that’s all about
item.description: In celebration of the 100th anniversary of the discovery of quantum mechanics, United Nations has declared 2025 as the International Year of Quantum Science and Technology.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Network jobs watch: Hiring, skills and certification trends
item.description: Network and infrastructure roles continue to shift as enterprises adopt technologies such as AI-driven network operations, multicloud networking, zero trust network access (ZTNA), and SD-WAN.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: San Jose green homes and tech hubs project due to launch in 2025
item.description: An effort to produce thousands of green homes alongside data centers in downtown San Jose is slated to launch in 2025.
item.dc:creator: George Avalos, The Mercury News

item.title: Cato Networks brings IoT, OT support to SASE platform
item.description: Cato Networks today announced new capabilities for its cloud-based service access service edge (SASE) platform that will enable enterprise organizations to more easily manage and secure Internet of Things (IoT) and operational technology (OT) devices.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: The Ultimate Guide to Decluttering Your iPhone Inbox
item.description: Learn how to delete multiple emails at once on your iPhone and transform your email management with these easy steps and tips.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 10 most in-demand enterprise IT skills
item.description: The software and services an organization chooses to fuel the enterprise can make or break its overall success.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: How to build better AI chatbots
item.description: At Campfire, we launched a consumer AI chat product called Cozy Friends on Steam and mobile on October 12. Imagine Animal Crossing or The Sims with AI agents. In the first 30 days, users exchanged more than 1.7M messages with our AI agents.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: 5G never delivered for cloud computing
item.description: I recall this as if it was yesterday. I entered the conference room to talk about cloud computing and 5G. I gave this type of presentation often a few years ago. The executives were excited about 5G’s potential. I took a deep breath, knowing I had to voice my concerns.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Cloudflare Radar Year in Review 2024: big source of traffic is AI crawlers
item.description: The internet is increasingly where we live today. In fact, global internet traffic grew 17.2% this year alone, according to Cloudflare.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Nvidia's stock dips after China opens probe of the AI chip company for violating anti-monopoly laws
item.description: Shares of Nvidia fell Monday after China said it is investigating the high-flying U.S. microchip company over suspected violations of Chinese anti-monopoly laws.
item.dc:creator: MATT OTT, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: California to consider requiring mental health warnings on social media sites
item.description: SACRAMENTO, Calif. (AP) — California, home to some of the largest technology companies in the world, would be the first U.S. state to require mental health warning labels on social media sites if lawmakers pass a bill introduced Monday.
item.dc:creator: TRÂN NGUYỄN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Struggling to hear TV dialogue? Try these simple fixes
item.description: If it sounds like actors on your TV are speaking in whispers, there's a way to fix it to make your TV audio sound better. The CyberGuy has several tips.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: IAEA chief: Iran is poised to 'quite dramatically' increase stockpile of near weapons-grade uranium
item.description: MANAMA, Bahrain (AP) — Iran is poised to “quite dramatically” increase its stockpile of near weapons-grade uranium as it has started cascades of advanced centrifuges, the head of the International Atomic Energy Agency warned Friday.
item.dc:creator: JON GAMBRELL, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Federal appeals court upholds law requiring sale or ban of TikTok in the US
item.description: A federal appeals court panel on Friday unanimously upheld a law that could lead to a ban on TikTok as soon as next month, handing a resounding defeat to the popular social media platform as it fights for its survival in the U.S. The U.S.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: From outsider to the Oval Office, bitcoin surges as a new administration embraces crypto
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Born from the ashes of the 2008 global financial crisis, bitcoin arrived after trust had withered in the financial system and in Washington's ability to protect those who must participate in it.
item.dc:creator: STAN CHOE, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Chinese online retailer Temu suspended in Vietnam
item.description: HANOI, Vietnam (AP) — Vietnam has suspended the operations of Chinese online retailer Temu after it failed to meet a government deadline to register the company by the end of November.
item.dc:creator: ANIRUDDHA GHOSAL, Associated Press, PIX 11
